title: FreshGuard Shark Tank Pitch & App Demo

requirements.text: Create a hero section at the top of the landing page featuring the FreshGuard logo (leaf + fridge icon design), the slogan 'Stay Fresh. Stay Smart. Waste Nothing.', and a call-to-action button. Use the green color scheme (#2ECC71, #27AE60) with clean whites and dark accents.

quotes: Hero section with FreshGuard logo (leaf + fridge icon design, green color scheme)
Slogan: 'Stay Fresh. Stay Smart. Waste Nothing.'

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is prominently displayed at the top of the page
FreshGuard logo incorporates a leaf and fridge icon motif
Slogan text is clearly visible
Color scheme uses #2ECC71 and #27AE60 greens with white and dark accents

requirements.text: Add a company info and mission section displaying: Company name 'FreshGuard Inc.', mission statement 'To eliminate food waste and promote healthier, smarter kitchens through innovative technology that keeps food fresh longer and keeps families informed.', and team members: CEO Jordan Ellis (Product Vision & Strategy), CTO Maya Chen (Hardware & Software Engineering), COO Marcus Webb (Operations & Manufacturing).
acceptanceCriteria: Mission statement is displayed verbatim
All three team members are listed with their titles and roles
Section is visually distinct and professional

requirements.text: Add a 'How It Works' section with 4 steps illustrated by emoji icons, covering: (1) Active carbon filter absorbs food odors, (2) Ethylene gas sensor detects spoiling food, (3) Barcode scanner tracks expiration dates, (4) Bluetooth chip sends alerts to phone and auto-releases mist cleanser when bad smells are detected.

quotes: How it works section (4 steps with icons)

acceptanceCriteria: Exactly 4 steps are shown in sequence
Each step has a distinct emoji icon
Steps clearly describe the device features
Layout is visually clean and scannable

requirements.text: Add a product features showcase section highlighting all 5 device features: Active carbon filter, Ethylene gas sensor, Barcode scanner for expiration dates, Bluetooth notifications, and Auto-mist cleanser. Use emoji icons and card-style layout.

quotes: Active carbon filter that absorbs food odors naturally

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 device features are displayed
Each feature has an emoji icon and short description
Layout uses cards or a grid

requirements.text: Add a target market section describing: health-conscious families and busy professionals, ages 25–50, households spending $150+/month on groceries. Include the unique value proposition: 'Only device that COMBINES odor absorption + gas detection + expiration tracking + auto-mist cleanse in one unit.'

quotes: Only device that COMBINES odor absorption + gas detection + expiration tracking + auto-mist cleanse in one unit

acceptanceCriteria: Target market demographics are clearly stated
Unique value proposition is prominently highlighted
Section is visually differentiated from adjacent sections

requirements.text: Add a Shark Tank-themed financials section with dramatic, investor-card styling. Display: Asking $500,000 for 15% equity, Company Valuation $3.3 Million, COGS $18/unit, Retail Price $79.99/unit, Markup 344%, App free with Premium subscription $4.99/month. Monthly expenses breakdown: Factory/Warehouse $8,000, Utilities $1,200, Advertising/Marketing $5,000, Employee Salaries (5 employees) $25,000, Total $39,200/month. Current Sales $180,000 (first 6 months). Projections: $1.2M Year 1, $4.5M Year 2, Projected Annual Profit $420,000 Year 1.

quotes: Shark Tank themed section with dramatic styling for the financial ask

acceptanceCriteria: The investment ask ($500K for 15%) is prominently displayed in a dramatic hero-style card
All expense line items are listed with correct amounts
Revenue projections for Year 1 and Year 2 are shown
Section uses a visually dramatic style distinct from other sections (e.g., dark background, spotlight effect)

requirements.text: Add an interactive app demo section showing a mock phone screen UI with: a food inventory list with items color-coded by expiration status (green = fresh, yellow = expiring soon, red = expired), a sample alerts panel with 3-day and 1-day warnings, and recipe suggestions for expiring food items. The phone mockup should be embedded within the pitch page.

quotes: Show a mock phone screen with the FreshGuard app UI
Food inventory list with expiration dates and status indicators (green/yellow/red)

acceptanceCriteria: A phone frame mockup is rendered on the page
Food inventory shows at least 5 sample items with color-coded expiration status
Alerts panel shows example 3-day and 1-day warnings
Recipe suggestions section shows at least 2 sample recipes tied to expiring items
The demo UI looks like a real mobile app screen

requirements.text: Apply smooth scroll animations and transitions throughout the page: sections should animate in as the user scrolls, feature cards should have hover effects, and the Shark Tank financials section should have a dramatic entrance animation. Ensure the layout is fully responsive across desktop and mobile screen sizes.
acceptanceCriteria: Sections animate into view on scroll
Cards have hover state transitions
Page is usable and well-laid-out on mobile viewports
No layout overflow or broken elements on small screens

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive visual theme throughout: primary greens #2ECC71 and #27AE60, clean white backgrounds, dark charcoal accents, modern sans-serif typography, generous whitespace, and emoji icons used consistently for visual appeal across all sections. The overall aesthetic should feel professional, startup-ready, and investor-facing.

quotes: Color scheme: Fresh greens (#2ECC71, #27AE60), clean whites, with dark accents
Modern, clean design that looks professional and investor-ready
Use emoji icons throughout for visual appeal

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette is consistently applied across all sections
Typography is uniform and professional
Emoji icons appear in headings and feature cards throughout
Overall design feels cohesive and polished

constraints: All content and UI must be frontend-only — no backend data persistence is required for the pitch/demo
Use only the specified green color scheme (#2ECC71, #27AE60) with white and dark accents
All financial figures, team names, and business details must match exactly as specified in the requirements
nonGoals: Actual Bluetooth or IoT device integration
Backend data storage for food inventory

required: FreshGuard logo combining a green leaf and a minimalist fridge silhouette on a white background, modern flat design style (freshguard-logo.dim_400x200.png)
Hero background with soft green gradient and subtle geometric pattern of leaves and droplets, fresh and clean aesthetic (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
FreshGuard smart fridge filter device product illustration, sleek white cylindrical device with green LED accents and sensor ports, on a white background (product-device.dim_600x600.png)
